ipAddr.label: Inverter IP / search
ipAddr.help: Enter the IPv4 address manually or open this field's dropdown to search and select a discovered inverter.

discoverySubnet.label: Discovery subnet
discoverySubnet.help: Optional /24 subnet for network discovery. Leave empty to use the configured IP address and local network interfaces.

validateIp.label: Validate inverter IP
validateIp.help: Checks whether the configured IP address is valid and answers the GoodWe ID request

discoverInverters.label: Test discovery
discoverInverters.help: Tests discovery and shows the raw result. To apply an IP, open the Inverter IP / search dropdown and select a found inverter.

pollCycle.label: Poll cycle
pollCycle.help: Poll cycle for data refreshment in seconds

pollExtended.label: Poll extended registers
pollExtended.help: Master switch for optional register groups

pollSimccid.label: Poll SIMCCID
pollSimccid.help: Read the optional device SIMCCID register

pollBmsDetail.label: Poll BMS detail
pollBmsDetail.help: Read BMS detail registers if supported by the inverter

pollPowerLimit.label: Poll power limit
pollPowerLimit.help: Read power limit registers if supported by the inverter

cleanupDisabledStates.label: Remove disabled optional states
cleanupDisabledStates.help: Delete states of disabled optional register groups on adapter start
